mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sky_take_out.customer_service_knowledge WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_weight ASC
SELECT * FROM sky_take_out.customer_service_knowledge WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_weight ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sky_take_out.customer_service_knowledge (category, keywords, question, answer, sort_weight, status, create_time) VALUES (#{category}, #{keywords}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{sortWeight}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sky_take_out.customer_service_knowledge SET category = #{category}, keywords = #{keywords}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, sort_weight = #{sortWeight}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
